nfcore_pre_params.label: Molecule Type
nfcore_pre_params.hint: DNA methylation or RNA modification analysis
nfcore_pre_params.hint_en: DNA methylation or RNA modification analysis

prereqs.description:
methylong samplesheet — one row per sample.
- group: sample group name. Auto-generate as 'group1', 'group2'... if not specified.
- sample: sample name. Use input filename without extension if not specified (e.g. 'PAU05248_pass_ffa693eb').
- path: FULL absolute path to the BAM or pod5 file.
- ref: FULL absolute path to the reference genome FASTA (optional — leave empty if no reference available).
- method: sequencing platform — 'pacbio' or 'ont'.

Each row represents one sample.
- sample: sample name.
- fastq_1: path to Read1 FASTQ file.
- fastq_2: path to Read2 FASTQ file (leave blank for single-end).
- strandedness: auto / forward / reverse / unstranded.

params.label: Data file (pod5 or fast5)
params.hint: ONT direct-RNA sequencing file. RNA004 kit required. Flowcell and kit will be auto-detected.

params.label: Modification type (optional, default: m6a)
params.hint: Choose the RNA modification signal to detect. Caller selection is resolved automatically from the workflow and modification type.

params.label: Device (optional, default: auto)
params.hint: Accepted forms: auto, cpu, cuda:0, cuda:0,1. Use auto to pick a free GPU when available.

params.label: Reference FASTA (transcriptome or genome, optional)
params.hint: If provided, modkit pileup will run to produce site-level modification statistics in bedMethyl format.

params.label: Resume from run dir (optional, leave empty to create new)
params.hint: If provided, the run metadata must match the current workflow and parameters before resume is allowed.

params.label: Data file (pod5 or fast5)
params.hint: ONT DNA sequencing file in pod5 or fast5 format.

params.label: Modification type (optional, default: 5mcpg)
params.hint: Choose the DNA modification signal to detect. Caller selection is resolved automatically from the workflow and modification type.

params.label: Device (optional, default: auto)
params.hint: Accepted forms: auto, cpu, cuda:0, cuda:0,1. Use auto to pick a free GPU when available.

params.label: Reference genome FASTA (optional)
params.hint: Providing a reference improves pileup accuracy and enables site-level modification statistics.

params.label: Resume from run dir (optional, leave empty to create new)
params.hint: If provided, the run metadata must match the current workflow and parameters before resume is allowed.

params.label: HiFi BAM
params.hint: PacBio local workflow currently assumes BAM input only. Some callers expect unaligned HiFi BAM before pbmm2; downstream pileup steps may also need a reference.

params.label: Modification type (optional, default: 5mcpg)
params.hint: PacBio local callers currently expose 5mcpg, 5mc, 5hmc, and 6ma.

params.label: Device (optional, default: auto)
params.hint: Accepted forms: auto, cpu, cuda:0, cuda:0,1. Use auto to pick a free GPU when available.

params.label: Resume from run dir (optional, leave empty to create new)
